human.name: Human
human.description: Humans are the most common species in Ansalon, adaptable and ambitious.

traits.abilityScoreIncrease: Choose any +2 and +1, or +1 to three different abilities

features.name: Resourceful
features.description: You gain proficiency in one skill of your choice.

features.name: Skillful
features.description: You gain proficiency with one tool of your choice.

features.name: Versatile
features.description: You gain an additional feat at 1st level.

half-elf.name: Half-Elf
half-elf.description: Half-elves combine human ambition with elven grace, often feeling at home in neither world.

features.name: Darkvision
features.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light.

features.name: Fey Ancestry
features.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.

features.name: Skill Versatility
features.description: You gain proficiency in two skills of your choice.

elf.name: Elf (Silvanesti/Qualinesti)
elf.description: Elves of Krynn are an ancient people, divided between the proud Silvanesti and the friendlier Qualinesti.

features.name: Darkvision
features.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light.

features.name: Keen Senses
features.description: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

features.name: Fey Ancestry
features.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.

features.name: Trance
features.description: Elves don't need to sleep. Instead, they meditate deeply for 4 hours a day.
